evals.prompt: Set up the Claude Code workspace for a new NestJS + React monorepo project. Generate CLAUDE.md, settings.json, and any hooks needed. Auto-detect the tech stack from package.json files.
evals.expected_output: CLAUDE.md with project rules, settings.json with permissions, stack auto-detected

assertions.name: claude_md_generated
assertions.description: CLAUDE.md created with project-specific rules and conventions

assertions.name: settings_json
assertions.description: settings.json with appropriate tool permissions

assertions.name: stack_detection
assertions.description: Tech stack auto-detected from package.json/pyproject.toml

assertions.name: build_commands
assertions.description: Build, test, and lint commands documented

assertions.name: hooks_configured
assertions.description: Pre-commit or validation hooks set up

evals.prompt: Configure the workspace for a Python Django project with Celery. Need: CLAUDE.md with Django conventions, settings for running manage.py commands, and hooks for linting with Ruff.
evals.expected_output: Django-specific CLAUDE.md, settings allowing manage.py, and Ruff hook

assertions.name: django_conventions
assertions.description: CLAUDE.md includes Django-specific rules (models, views, serializers)

assertions.name: manage_py_permission
assertions.description: Settings allow running manage.py commands

assertions.name: ruff_hook
assertions.description: Pre-commit hook configured for Ruff linting

assertions.name: test_command
assertions.description: pytest command documented in CLAUDE.md

assertions.name: celery_commands
assertions.description: Celery worker and beat commands documented

evals.prompt: Set up workspace for a Flutter mobile app. Auto-detect that it's Flutter from pubspec.yaml. Configure appropriate build and test commands.
evals.expected_output: Flutter-specific workspace with dart/flutter commands and test configuration

assertions.name: flutter_detected
assertions.description: Flutter detected from pubspec.yaml

assertions.name: flutter_commands
assertions.description: flutter run, flutter test, flutter build documented

assertions.name: dart_analysis
assertions.description: dart analyze or flutter analyze configured

assertions.name: platform_targets
assertions.description: iOS and Android build targets documented

assertions.name: claude_md
assertions.description: CLAUDE.md with Flutter conventions

evals.prompt: Update the workspace setup for an existing project that just added a Python AI service alongside the existing NestJS backend. Need to add Python-specific settings without breaking existing config.
evals.expected_output: Updated CLAUDE.md and settings with Python additions, preserving existing NestJS config

assertions.name: preserves_existing
assertions.description: Existing NestJS configuration preserved

assertions.name: adds_python
assertions.description: Python service commands and conventions added

assertions.name: multi_service
assertions.description: Both services documented with their respective commands

assertions.name: virtual_env
assertions.description: Python virtual environment setup documented

assertions.name: incremental_update
assertions.description: Changes are additive, not destructive

evals.prompt: Generate a CLAUDE.md for a Go microservice project using Chi router, PostgreSQL with golang-migrate, and Docker. Include Go-specific conventions and common commands.
evals.expected_output: Go-specific CLAUDE.md with idiomatic Go rules, migration commands, and Docker setup

assertions.name: go_conventions
assertions.description: Go-specific rules (error handling, naming, package structure)

assertions.name: migration_commands
assertions.description: golang-migrate up/down/create commands documented

assertions.name: docker_commands
assertions.description: Docker build and run commands documented

assertions.name: test_command
assertions.description: go test ./... with coverage documented

assertions.name: linter
assertions.description: golangci-lint configuration mentioned
